description: "Use when writing, reviewing or modifying frontend code. Project-specific overrides for frontend standards."
applyTo: ["**/*.vue", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", "**/*.scss", "**/*.css"]
---

# Frontend Coding Standards (Project Overrides)

> This file overrides portions of the global standard that need project-specific adjustments.
> Global standard: user-level `coding-standards-frontend.instructions.md`

> TypeScript: 5.x
> Pinia: 2.x
> Element Plus: 2.x
